name: Baichuan2-13B
license: Apache-2.0 (code) + Baichuan2 Community License for weights (free commercial use if DAU<1M, non-cloud-provider, no sublicensing)
archDisplay: Dense decoder-only Transformer with ALiBi positional bias, 40 layers
note: Flagship of the Baichuan 2 open bilingual (zh/en) series, trained on 2.6T tokens with ALiBi attention; released as Base+Chat+4bit with a full technical report.

results.notes: 3-shot, Baichuan2-13B-Base; from the official README's Math & Code results table (also matches the arXiv 2309.10305 technical report).

4-shot, Baichuan2-13B-Base. Score is low relative to the taxonomy's typical 20-100 range for 'math' but is the genuine reported number for this pre-CoT-era 13B dense base model on the full Hendrycks MATH set; included as-is rather than omitted or altered.
5-shot (4-candidate multiple-choice subset only, per the paper's methodology), Baichuan2-13B-Base.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real via arXiv 2309.10305, MarkTechPost (2023-09-19), and the official GitHub README_EN.md. All 6 benchmark scores (C-Eval 58.1, MMLU 59.17, CMMLU 61.97, GSM8K 52.77, HumanEval 17.07, BBH 48.78) confirmed to literally appear in the README table for the 13B-Base model. License (Apache-2.0 code + custom community license with DAU<1M free-commercial-use clause) confirmed. Context length 4096 (4K) confirmed via Ollama model metadata; retargeted ctxK sourceUrl from an unrelated HF text-generation-inference PR to a source that actually states the figure. Corrected hf link from Baichuan2-13B-Chat (was mistakenly Base in original links.hf field is now Chat, matching the Chat/4bit release most commonly used).
